mapper.select: SELECT a.id AS id, a.stage_id AS stageId, a.file_name AS fileName, a.file_url AS fileUrl, a.content_type AS contentType, a.mime_type AS mimeType, a.size_bytes AS sizeBytes, DATE_FORMAT(a.uploaded_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS uploadedAt FROM service_stage_attachment a JOIN service_stage s ON s.id = a.stage_id JOIN student_service_case c ON c.id = s.case_id WHERE c.order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY a.stage_id ASC, a.sort_order ASC, a.id ASC
